                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                be such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . By Soft Extension, it follows that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . Toward a contradiction, assume that  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                                holds. Since  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , the hypothesis yields  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , which is impossible.

(i)  
                                  ⇒ 
                                (iii). We prove the contrapositive. Assume that there are  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     , 
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∼ 
                                        
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                               ,  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               , and  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∼ 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           ⊥ 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . Thus, we have  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              S 
                                           
                                           
                                              > 
                                           
                                        
                                        ∘ 
                                        S 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               , but  
                                  
                                     ¬ 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        x 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              S 
                                           
                                           
                                              > 
                                           
                                        
                                        y 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               , that is,  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              S 
                                           
                                           
                                              > 
                                           
                                        
                                        ∘ 
                                        S 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     ⊈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . This shows that  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                fails to be weakly monotonic. Similarly, if  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∼ 
                                        
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                               ,  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∼ 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           ⊥ 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                holds, then Weak Monotonicity fails again.

(iii)  
                                  ⇒ 
                                (i). Assume that (iii) holds. Let  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     , 
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                be such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               . By hypothesis, we cannot have  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                               , hence we obtain  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               . Similarly, if  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     , 
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                are such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     z 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               , then the hypothesis yields  
                                  
                                     ¬ 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        y 
                                        
                                        S 
                                        
                                        x 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               , hence  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                                again. This shows that  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                is weakly monotonic, as claimed.  ■

The following immediate consequence of  Lemma 4.3  will be useful:

We still need an additional order-theoretic result, which we shall state in a more general way than needed, that is, for  weakly  comonotonic bi-preferences:

Lemma 4.5 
                            
                               Let  
                               
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     )

                                  X

                                     ,

                                     ∈ 
                                     X

                                           ⟹ 
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       x

                                                       , 
                                                       
                                                          
                                                             S

                                                       ,

                                                       x 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       ↑ 
                                                       , 
                                                       R 
                                                    
                                                 
                                                 ∩ 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       y 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       ↑ 
                                                       , 
                                                       R 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           .

Let

                                     R 
                                     ,

Proof 
                            Assume that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                are such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ⊥ 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               . We prove the first equality only, since the proof of the second is similar. Let  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , that is,  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . The hypothesis readily implies  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               , and so  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . For the reverse inclusion, assume that  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , i.e.,  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     R 
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     R 
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . By Soft Extension, we obtain  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     z

                                     z 
                                     
                                     S

                                were to hold, then we would get  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     R 
                                     
                                     z 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                               , hence  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     S 
                                     
                                     x 
                                  
                                by Transitive Coherence, a contradiction. It follows that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . A similar argument yields  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . We conclude  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , as claimed.  ■

Assume that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                are such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ⊥ 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               . We prove the first equality only, since the proof of the second is similar. Let  
                                  
                                     z 
                                     ∈

                                           ↓ 
                                           ,

                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩

                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , that is,  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z 
                                  
                               . The hypothesis readily implies  
                                  
                                     x

                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     z

                                     y 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           R 
                                        
                                        
                                           >

                                     z

                                     z

                                     ∈

                                           ↓

Here we present two topological consequences of  Lemmas 4.4 and 4.5 . Specifically, we show that whenever the order-section topology induced by a strongly comonotonic bi-preference is connected, the soft component is simultaneously strictly covering and splitting.

The first result of this section requires the full power of Strong Comonotonicity.

Lemma 4.6 
                            
                               If  
                               
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                
                               is a strongly comonotonic bi-preference such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is connected, then  
                               
                                  S 
                                
                               is strictly covering.

If  
                               
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                
                               is a strongly comonotonic bi-preference such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is connected, then  
                               
                                  S 
                                
                               is strictly covering.

Proof 
                            Suppose  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                is a strongly comonotonic bi-preference such that the order-section topology  
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                is connected. By  Lemma 3.5 ,  
                                  R 
                                is closed-semicontinuous and  
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        > 
                                     
                                  
                                is open-semicontinuous in  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     X 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           τ 
                                        
                                        
                                           R 
                                           , 
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           ↓ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . To show that  
                                  S 
                                is strictly covering, let  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                be such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               .  Lemma 4.4  yields  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . The closed-semicontinuity of  
                                  R 
                                implies that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is closed. Dually, the open-semicontinuity of  
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        > 
                                     
                                  
                                implies that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is open. It follows that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is both closed and open; further, it is nonempty, since  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                by the reflexivity of  
                                  R 
                               . Now the connectedness of  
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                implies that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     X 
                                  
                               , that is,  
                                  S 
                                is strictly covering.  ■

Suppose  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                is a strongly comonotonic bi-preference such that the order-section topology  
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                is connected. By  Lemma 3.5 ,  
                                  R 
                                is closed-semicontinuous and  
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        > 
                                     
                                  
                                is open-semicontinuous in  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     X 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           τ 
                                        
                                        
                                           R 
                                           , 
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           ↓ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . To show that  
                                  S 
                                is strictly covering, let  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                be such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           > 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               .  Lemma 4.4  yields  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . The closed-semicontinuity of  
                                  R 
                                implies that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is closed. Dually, the open-semicontinuity of  
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        > 
                                     
                                  
                                implies that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is open. It follows that the set  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                is both closed and open; further, it is nonempty, since  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           R 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                by the reflexivity of  
                                  R 
                               . Now the connectedness of  
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                implies that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∪ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     X 
                                  
                               , that is,  
                                  S 
                                is strictly covering.  ■

Our second topological result holds under the milder assumption of Weak Comonotonicity.

Lemma 4.7 
                            
                               If  
                               
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                
                               is a weakly comonotonic bi-preference such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is connected, then  
                               
                                  S 
                                
                               is splitting.

If  
                               
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                
                               is a weakly comonotonic bi-preference such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is connected, then  
                               
                                  S 
                                
                               is splitting.

Proof 
                            Suppose  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     R 
                                     , 
                                     S 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                is a weakly comonotonic bi-preference such that the order-section topology  
                                  
                                     
                                        τ 
                                     
                                     
                                        R 
                                        , 
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ↑ 
                                        ↓ 
                                     
                                  
                                is connected. By  Lemma 3.5 ,  
                                  R 
                                is closed-semicontinuous and  
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        > 
                                     
                                  
                                is open-semicontinuous in  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     X 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           τ 
                                        
                                        
                                           R 
                                           , 
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↑ 
                                           ↓ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . Let  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     , 
                                     y 
                                     ∈ 
                                     X 
                                  
                                be such that  
                                  
                                     x 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           ⊥ 
                                        
                                     
                                     y 
                                  
                               .  Lemma 4.5  yields the equalities  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ∩ 
                                     
                                        
                                           y 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 S 
                                              
                                              
                                                 > 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           x 
                                        
                                        
                                           ↓
